name: Chuugoku
description: __Height:__ 169cm (5’6”) As the oldest country in the series, China has seen a lot over the years. He’s known for having a long history, the roots of Asian culture, and the largest population on earth. He has a rather serious personality and is very superstitious, but can be immature at times. Food is known as being his first priority in life, and he even complains if food has a certain pattern of tastes and flavors. China is very artistic and can even paint a picture on a strand of hair, but is

name: Cithis
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Member of the Canaries, an Elf group sent to investigate the dungeon. She appears to be second in command to Misurn. Her magic specialty is unknown, but she offers to 'burn' an enemy at one point, and seems to use a tool that looks like a branch of lily of the valley flowers. She was convicted for the use of ancient magic, incitement to murder, documents forgery and fraud. Sentenced for life. name: Collot
description: English sheepdog who is part of the canine room 701 with Legoshi. He has a calm and friendly personality and is often seen offering rides to their smallest group member, Voss.

name: Dicta Striker
description: Dicta Striker is the self proclaimed ace of her grade at Tracen Academy and classmate of [Oguri Cap](https://anilist.co/character/96114/Oguri-Cap). She appears rough and violent at first glance, but she is actually caring and good-natured. She is the type who wants to compete with everything she has in order to win.

name: Elena Amamiya
description: A third year middle school student with a radiant smile. She is the most popular girl in school, to the point where she is known as the school's "sun." She lives at a flower shop in the town's shopping district, where she sometimes works, and has six younger brothers and sisters whom she often takes care of in place of her busy parents.
mediaTitles: Star☆Twinkle Precure: Hoshi no Uta ni Omoi wo Komete

name: Elena Arshavina
nativeName: エレーナ・アルシャヴィナ
description: Elena is a cute Russian exchange student who has come to the Japanese branch, where she promptly proceeds to ask Haimura Moroha to date her. While giving an introduction in class, she mentions that she has no family besides a younger brother, and that she has come with the express purpose of being in a relationship with Haimura.

nativeName: 銀ギツネのフォクシー
description: Foxy the Silver Fox is the captain of the Foxy Pirates. __Appearance:__ Foxy is a stout man with skinny arms and legs. He has almost a cleft lip-like mouth and an unique hairstyle. His nose is also colored red, it is long just like the nose of Kaku and Usopp. With these characteristics, they make him look like a fox. Foxy typically wears yellow orange suspenders and a coat. name: Freya
description: ~!Freya was one of the two Persocoms that were part of a series of Persocoms known as "CHOBITS". She was created because the wife of Ichiro Mihara (the inventor of the Persocoms), Chitose Hibiya, was unable to bear children. All was fine, until poor Freya fell in love with Ichiro. Freya eventually broke from the strain on her circuits. name: Fuuta Okeya
description: 14-year-old boy with the ability to see ghosts. Falls in love at first sight with Kouko Ishigami, who doesn't necessarily share the same feelings.

Ganesha appears to be very flamboyant, speaking in a loud voice and making poses. name: Ginko Tsukitsuba
description: __Species:__ Human Ginko Tsukitsuba is a prodigy samurai who wishes to die a respectable death on the battlefield. In her first battle, however, she failed to find her desired end against the enemy army. Faced with her unfulfilled wish, she now seeks out someone strong enough to grant her an honorable warrior's death. After praying to Buddha, she unexpectedly finds herself transported to a world of magic and fantasy. Ginko’s herculean strength is commented on multiple times in the series. Her fi

name: Han-Ryang Seo
description: Seo Han-Ryang (서한량, Seohanlyang) was a member of The Six. He was the 27th leader of the National Homeless Association prior to giving that title to Yu Mi-Ra. He is an advanced weapons expert, capable of using 108 National Treasures. (Source: God of High School wiki)

name: Hank Henriette
description: A former captain of an Incarnate Soldier unit that fought on the side of the Union during the Civil War. He always wears a white trenchcoat with a hood, and is known as the "Beast Hunter," due to his travels to hunt down the Incarnate heroes that have reverted to being mere beasts after the war. He still wields his harpoon-like weapon from during the war, and excels at close combat. (ANN)

name: Haruna Amaori
description: She is Renako's younger sister. She is a second-year junior high school student and a member of the badminton club. She is naturally extroverted and athletic, unlike her older sister.

name: Haruna Nagashima
description: Shortly after entering high school, Haruna becomes determined to find a boyfriend under the influence of all the shoujo manga she reads. She accidentally meets Yoh after a failed attempt at being "picked up" by guys and asks him to coach her on how to be more attractive. After some prodding, Yoh finally accepts to teach her under two conditions; one: she mustn’t cry, and two: she cannot fall in love with him. She eagerly accepts, and the two start training. Yoh helps her on a day to day basis, g

name: Itsuki Kawasumi
description: A high school student summoned to another world as the Bow Hero. He is usually calm and well-mannered. However, He has a messiah complex, and is pretty much a justice maniac. He vanquishes evildoers without thinking of the consequences of his actions. However, this is just because he is immature. He doesn't actually have any bad intentions. ~!When the Spirit Turtle revived, Itsuki and the party was forced to challenge it, but the party ran away, leaving him as a sacrifice to the Turtle.!~

name: Jin Mazama
description: __Species:__ Human After he got beaten by bears as a kid, he started hating all animals, knowing they can't understand each other ever again. He is easily annoyed by animals, especially when they are wild and noisy.

name: Jou Joujima
description: **Height:** 177 cm Jo is the captain of the water polo team in which Minato plays for while he's in high school. He was the one to recruit Minato for the team.

name: Jun Arashiyama
description: He is an A-rank middle range All-Rounder in Border and the leader of Arashiyama Unit. He is also one of the eleven candidates for Yuuichi Jin's Fuujin. (Source: World Trigger Wiki)

name: Kadokura Yuudai
description: Kadokura Yuudai is the #16 Referee of Kakerou. ~!At some point after the events of the Labyrinth Arcs and the Tower of Karma Arc, he became the #2 Referee.!~ Kadokura is a tall man with a distinguishing appearance with the most noticeable thing being his black hair set in a large pompadour (a style he has had since his delinquent days). As with all Referees, Kadokura dresses in a formal black suit with a noticeably long blazer jacket; he also wears a pair of unique white gloves which have a mult

name: Karlyle Frost
description: __Height:__ 185 cm (6’1”) __Designation:__ Alpha __Occupation:__ Director of an investment company Karlyle is the eldest son of the noble Frost family. He suffers from sexual dysfunction of a psychosomatic nature, where he meets and has sex with Ash as part of his treatment.

name: Kayo Senju
description: Kayo is Shougen's Model Dolphin Initiator. She has an IQ of 210 but is unsuited to front-line battles. During her mission to eliminate the Hiruko pair, she was separated from Shougen and met Rentarou.

name: Kazushige Sanda
description: __Height:__ 161 cm A second year middle school student at Daikoku Aigo Academy who is a descendant of Santa Claus. He was determined to hide the curse of Santa Claus, but his powers were recently unleashed. When he transforms into Santa, he becomes a muscular old man who works hard to grant the wishes of children.
